layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one transaction per column (3 columns), attribute labels down the left (EIF; SP, DC, JT; Security Name; Ticker; Transaction; Amount of Transaction A-L + Spouse/DC; Type of Transaction; Capital Gain; Transaction Date). Selections are black-filled cells. The 'SP, DC, JT' row and the 'Transaction' row are continuous black bands across all three columns (no letters visible). Amount fills: F (col 1), D (col 2), C (col 3). Type of Transaction: Partial Sale band spans cols 1-2, Purchase fill in col 3. Footer group label: 'MS Areco'.
